name: LinkCampus - A Social Platform
desc: LinkCampus is an innovative social platform designed exclusively for college students. It leverages the power of the MERN stack to create a robust and dynamic environment with a real-time chat functionality.

name: DisKas - Forum Platform
desc: DisKas is an online forum platform designed for programmers to ask questions and seek answers related to programming languages and development, built using a combination of PHP, MySQL, and JavaScript

name: NetFlix Clone
desc: NetFlix clone built using Next.js, Magic Authentication, Hasura Database & GraphQL.

name: NewPortal
desc: NewsPortal built on the Laravel framework. The platform provides real-time updates on the latest news across a wide range of categories.
